name: Warlock

abilities.name: Shadow Bolt
abilities.desc: Sends a shadowy bolt at the enemy for $d Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Summon Imp
abilities.desc: Summons an Imp under the command of the Warlock. The Imp hurls Firebolts at your enemies from afar. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Demon Skin
abilities.desc: Demonic skin increases your armor by 30 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Immolate
abilities.desc: Burns the enemy for 11 Fire damage and an additional $d over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Corruption
abilities.desc: Corrupts the target, causing $d Shadow damage over 18 sec.

abilities.name: Summon Voidwalker
abilities.desc: Summons a Voidwalker under the command of the Warlock. The Voidwalker is a sturdy demon that taunts your enemies and soaks up punishment. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Curse of Agony
abilities.desc: Curses the target with agony: $d Shadow damage over 24 sec.

abilities.name: Drain Life
abilities.desc: Drains the target's life, transferring $d health to you each second for 5 sec.

abilities.name: Fear
abilities.desc: Strikes terror into the enemy, leaving it cowering for up to 8 sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

abilities.name: Searing Pain
abilities.desc: Sears the enemy with agonizing fire for $d Fire damage. Quick to cast.

abilities.name: Shadowburn
abilities.desc: Instantly blasts the target with Shadow Flame for $d Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Summon Succubus
abilities.desc: Summons a Succubus under the command of the Warlock. The Succubus is a fragile demon that strikes quickly and hits hard in melee. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Summon Felhunter
abilities.desc: Summons a Felhunter under the command of the Warlock. The Felhunter harries enemies from range with Shadow Bite and excels at hunting spellcasters. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Summon Felguard
abilities.desc: Summons a Felguard under the command of the Warlock. The Felguard is a durable melee demon that wades into battle and holds its own. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Summon Infernal
abilities.desc: Binds an Infernal to your will — a hulking juggernaut with crushing melee and the deepest health and armor of any demon. A long cooldown gates its raw power. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Summon Doomguard
abilities.desc: Binds a Doomguard to your will — an elite demon that rains heavy Shadow damage from afar. A long cooldown gates its devastating power. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

abilities.name: Rain of Fire
abilities.desc: Calls a rain of fire onto the target area, burning enemies for $d Fire damage.

playbook: You are playing a Warlock (mana-based, ranged).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: if mana < 20% and out of combat, drink before pulling.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to ability range (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
